headers.name: Content-Security-Policy
headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: hyper: pear:; connect-src 'self' hyper: pear: https://outbox.peerit.site; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
